since_last: 65% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.19%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -0.51% · Gold +0.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 65% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.19%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.19%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +5.56%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +5.56%, MU +4.70%, EQIX +3.75%, TER +3.61%, BIDU +3.38%. Laggards: SAP -1.63%, CRNC -1.51%, CRM -1.45%, NOW -1.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.34% at $125.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
